tree.name: Derrick White
tree.tradeDescription: Celtics acquire White for Richardson, Langford, 2022 1st (protected 1-4), 2028 swap

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Richardson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics acquire Richardson for Moses Brown

assetsGivenUp.name: Moses Brown
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of Kemba Walker trade. Celtics sent Walker, 2021 #16 pick, 2025 2nd. Received Horford, Brown, 2025 2nd

assetsGivenUp.name: Kemba Walker
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed 4yr/$141M max contract as unrestricted free agent from Charlotte
assetsGivenUp.note: Free agent signing - TRUE ORIGIN. No assets exchanged.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#16)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics own pick from 2020-21 season (36-36 record)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to OKC in Kemba trade, eventually became #16 pick used on Sengun

assetsGivenUp.name: Romeo Langford
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted with pick acquired from SAC (via PHI in Fultz trade)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#14) via SAC
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of Fultz trade. Celtics traded #1 pick for #3 pick (Tatum) and future SAC 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick (#1) via BKN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: BKN traded KG, Pierce, Jason Terry, D.J. White, 2017 1st (#27, Kyle Kuzma via pick swap), and 2017 2nd (Sasha Vezenkov) to BOS for Bogans, Brooks, Humphries, Joseph, Wallace, 2014 1st (James Young), 2016 1st (#3 Jaylen Brown), 2017 1st (#1 Markelle Fultz, swapped to #3 Tatum), and 2018 1st (Collin Sexton).
assetsGivenUp.note: Same origin as Jayson Tatum - see Tatum tree for full Nets trade breakdown

assetsGivenUp.name: Paul Pierce
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Celtics with their OWN pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Garnett
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Reference node - see Jayson Tatum tree for complete KG trade chain (Al Jefferson, Gerald Green, Ryan Gomes, Sebastian Telfair, Theo Ratliff, 2009 1st)
assetsGivenUp.note: Full trade details in Tatum tree. Acquired for multiple assets including Al Jefferson (2004 own pick).

assetsGivenUp.name: Jason Terry
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent from Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: D.J. White
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward, signed 10-day contract with BOS (Feb 28, 2013). Previously played in China. Sent to BKN in the KG/Pierce mega-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick (#27)
assetsGivenUp.note: BOS own 2017 1st, sent to BKN. BKN got #27 via pick swap. Lakers drafted Kuzma.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to BKN in KG/Pierce trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick (#25)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics own pick - conveyed #25 to Spurs
assetsGivenUp.note: Own pick - TRUE ORIGIN. Spurs used on Blake Wesley.
